meta_description: Access the databanks for troubleshooting, guides, and secure communication channels.
category_getting_started_desc: System startup and basic configuration protocols.
category_troubleshooting_desc: Diagnostics for connection and tunneling errors.
category_security_desc: Details on Anti-DPI, obfuscation, and zero-logs policies.
faq_1_q: How do I bypass DPI restrictions?
faq_1_a: Our core utilizing VLESS+Reality automatically masks your traffic as standard HTTPS. Ensure you have the latest core update applied.
faq_2_q: Why is my connection speed degraded?
faq_2_a: Check your node's ping. If packet loss exceeds 5%, reroute to an alternate shard in the Server Grid.
faq_3_a: Negative. All databanks are volatile. We operate on a strict zero-knowledge architecture.
faq_4_a: The network accepts connections from Windows, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Android clients via standard Xray/Sing-box protocols.
contact_desc: Unable to resolve your anomaly in the archives? Establish a direct secure comm channel with our operators.
